articles.title: US-Iran war: Trump says Tehran presented new offers 10 minutes after he cancelled US team's trip
articles.description: President Donald Trump has rejected a new peace proposal from Iran. He stated the offer was not good enough. Trump emphasized that Iran will not possess nuclear weapons. He mentioned that negotiations were halted due to extensive travel and the absence of direct talks with Iran's leader. The US will now communicate via telephone.

articles.title: "Shadow fleet" intercepted: US Navy forces sanctioned tanker Sevan to retreat toward Iran
articles.description: The US Navy has intercepted an Iranian vessel, the M/V Sevan, in the Arabian Sea. This ship is part of Iran's 'shadow fleet' and was forced to return to Iranian waters. This action is part of a broader US naval blockade targeting Iranian energy exports. US forces are enforcing sanctions and have redirected 37 vessels since the blockade began.

articles.description: A birthday celebration in Bulandshahr, UP, ended in tragedy after an argument over smearing cake on the birthday boy's face escalated. The accused, Jeetu Saini, and his accomplices allegedly shot and killed three men. Saini is currently at large.

articles.title: Rohtak student earns global recognition with University of Adelaide solar energy project
articles.description: Maharshi Dayanand University student Vanshika Gahlawat from Kheri Sadh village has been selected for a $22,000 solar energy research project at the University of Adelaide. Under scientist Heike Ebendorff-Heidepriem, she will develop quantum-cutting composites to improve solar panel efficiency in extreme environments. Supported by Praxis Labs, her achievement has been widely praised as an inspiration for rural students to pursue global scientific opportunities.

Results will be available on the official website, UMANG app, and via SMS. Students can download provisional marksheets for immediate Class 11 admissions. Check official website, gbshse.in for details.

articles.title: Justin Bieber shares sweet fishing moments with son Jack Blues in a rare family glimpse
articles.description: Pop star Justin Bieber is taking a break from his busy schedule to enjoy simple family moments. He recently shared heartwarming photos of a fishing trip with his one-year-old son, Jack Blues Bieber, offering fans a rare peek into their private life. This comes after a whirlwind period for the couple, including Bieber's Coachella performances and Hailey's event collaborations.
